name: Mississippi Mud Pie (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly blend the crust ingredients in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom of a pan.
3. Blend together half of the Cool Whip, sugar, and cream cheese.
4. Spread this mixture on top of the crust.
5. Whisk together the puddings and milk.
6. Spread the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
7. Top with the remaining Cool Whip.
